# 📦 CHTTP

A very simple lightweight http server written in C.

## 📥 Installation

Clone the repository:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/monakaibrahim-cmyk/simple-chttp.git chttp
cd chttp
```

Build the project

```bash
cmake -B build
cmake --b build
```

## 📁 Project Structure
```
www/
---/index.html
```
